name_en: CHANE🌷 ZP Development New Model Black Grained Ball Chain
name_cn:
CHANE🌷 ZP Development New Model Black Grained Ball Chain
Shoulder bag with double chain, available in two series: Grained Ball Chain and Calfskin:
1:1 paper pattern replica, imported calfskin with large logo, high-end and atmospheric, huge capacity, fiber lining, classic logo design is very creative, calfskin logo, excellent texture. Model No: A2215
Size: 33*11*23
